title: Vacancy for Teacher at Coursera India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Coursera India
jsonLd.description:
Coursera India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Coursera India:
Coursera India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India!
